channel.title: Documentation update needed for Dynamic Public Path and Server Extensibility
channel.description:
We've released two important features that need documentation.
- [Dynamic Public Path](https://community.frontity.org/t/frontity-release-dynamic-public-path/5790/10) - [Server Extensibility](https://community.frontity.org/t/frontity-release-server-extensibility/6030)
It'd be great if someone could contribute with the documentation for those features (or one of them 🙂)
[This is the guide to contributing to the documentation](https://github.com/frontity/docs/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md). And these are the Feature Discussions and Pull Requests of these features:
- Dynamic Public Path - [Feature Discussion](https://community.frontity.org/t/change-publicpath-dynamically-at-runtime/1588) - [Pull Request](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/890) - Server Extensibility - [Feature Discussion](https://community.frontity.org/t/server-extensibility/2810/23) - [Pull Request](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/916)
If you want to help with any of those, please answer here! Thanks!! 😄👏

item.title: Documentation update needed for Dynamic Public Path and Server Extensibility
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
We’ve released two important features that need documentation.

  • Dynamic Public Path
  • Server Extensibility

It’d be great if someone could contribute with the documentation for those features (or one of them )

This is the guide to contributing to the documentation. And these are the Feature Discussions and Pull Requests of these features:

  • Dynamic Public Path
    • Feature Discussion
    • Pull Request
  • Server Extensibility
    • Feature Discussion
    • Pull Request

If you want to help with any of those, please answer here! Thanks!!

Read full topic
item.source: Documentation update needed for Dynamic Public Path and Server Extensibility
